name: @cmdctrl/gemini-cli
description: CmdCtrl daemon for Google Gemini CLI agent

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const p=require(\"./package.json\"); const bad=Object.entries(p.dependencies||{}).filter(([,v])=>v.startsWith(\"file:\")); if(bad.length){console.error(\"ERROR: file: dependencies are not allowed in published packages:\",bad.map(([k,v])=>k+\"=\"+v).join(\", \")); process.exit(1)}"
